cause_analysis.narrative: Realtooth | Best Dental Clinic churned on 2026-04-10 after 318 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 29-day silence starting 2026-02-06. Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-03-09 via email. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.

messages.body: Welcome to RealTooth Dental Clinic, Houston.

Subject: Arpita, Missed Payment Alert 🚨\n\nBody: 96 Missed Payment Hope you are doing well! We wanted to let you know that your recent subscription renewal for Realtooth | Best Dental Clinic didn’t go through as planned. This can happen for simple reasons like a temporary card issue, expired details, or insufficient fu…

Subject: A quick note for you!\n\nBody: 96 Hi Arpita It’s Mannica again. You might have seen my note earlier. I’ve been working with salons and spas for about three years now.
